## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` -- new feature
- [ ] `fix` -- bug fix
- [ ] `docs` -- documentation only
- [ ] `test` -- adding or updating tests
- [ ] `refactor` -- code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `chore` -- build, tooling, dependencies
- [ ] `ci` -- CI/CD changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally.
- [ ] Public functions and classes have docstrings.
- [ ] Touched code stays within the 30-lines-per-function guideline.
- [ ] Heavy I/O (`librosa.load`, network, file system) is mocked in tests.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` for user-visible changes.
- [ ] No AI co-author lines in commits.

## Testing notes

<!-- How did you verify the change? Include sample commands and any audio
sources used. -->
